description: Melon is a Korean music streaming service. Available public evidence for developer integrations currently points to an MCP server endpoint associated with Melon, with no public API, GraphQL, or CLI documentation found on melon.com.
summary: Melon exposes an MCP server at https://mcp.melon.com/mcp/ (streamable HTTP); no public evidence of REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces was found on melon.com.
